title: Turkish-Style Flatbread
description: A simple recipe to make crispy and delicious Turkish-style flatbreads, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the torn flaky bread, yeast, and salt.
2. Gradually add the water, mixing well to form a sticky dough.
3. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
4. Cover the dough and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
5. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
6. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired flatbread size.
7. Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
8. Cook the flatbreads for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
